closure_decision.surviving_evidence_role: diagnostic evidence for why goal-region coverage and object-relation coverage remain insufficient for terminal ObjectNav goal validity

agent_inference.why_closed: This branch did acquire useful evidence and exposes wrong-goal/wasted-path/map-pose diagnostic surfaces, but it cannot naturally support a terminal selector. Fully covered goal-region/object-relation evidence includes one a_wrong_b_correct row, and most rows retain object-relation gaps.
agent_inference.method_implication: The next method step should select a new label-free branch that explains the wrong fully covered case or resolves object-relation gaps, rather than tuning thresholds on this branch.
agent_inference.natural_proof_alignment: The branch is closed because the observed mechanism blocks the intended terminal interpretation; this prevents motivation-driven claim fitting.

minimum_future_terminal_contract_require: A future label-free rule must separate fully covered but wrong candidate-pair cases from fully covered correct cases.
A future branch must reduce object-relation gaps without using evaluation-only labels as action inputs.
Wrong-goal, wasted-path, and map/pose metrics may be joined only after action/evidence rows are frozen.
Terminal selector promotion requires fixed held-out validation, not threshold tuning on this diagnostic subset.
